title: Juvenile Hormone treatments on mealybugs
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"5gsuu","text":"Pyriproxyfen dissolved in methanol is volatile and harmful for the environment. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9a87g","text":"Separate brushes for control and treated samples.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2tj93","text":"Discard material that touched pyriproxyfen in plastic bags and using the guidelines for cytotoxic waste or similar of your institution.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b02v4","text":"Wipe surface with 70% ethanol after treatments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Isabelle Vea
